role: MP for Tehran, 12th Majlis (2024–present); publisher, Noh Dey Weekly
bio: Hamid Rasaee is a hardline cleric representing Tehran in the [Islamic Consultative Assembly](/orgs/islamic-consultative-assembly) (12th Majlis). He is a senior figure of the [Front of Islamic Revolution Stability](/orgs/front-of-islamic-revolution-stability) and publisher of the *Noh Dey Weekly*, shut down multiple times during the [Hassan Rouhani](/people/hassan-rouhani) presidency. He publicly clashed in a famous 2015 parliamentary confrontation with an aide of [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei) over the [JCPOA](/events/jcpoa-nuclear-deal-2015). He was previously disqualified by the [Guardian Council](/orgs/guardian-council) from one election cycle. He served in the 8th and 9th Majlis before returning in the 12th.
editorial_notes: Born 23 July 1967. Served 8th (2008–12) and 9th (2012–16) Majlis. Disqualified by Guardian Council for 10th Majlis. Returned in 12th Majlis.
